jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd:
WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd!
